headline: Forget Cardano, Bitcoin Cash, Dogecoin: Litecoin Activity Surpasses Them All
summary: According to Jay Milla, the director of the Litecoin Foundation, the number of active addresses on the Litecoin (CRYPTO: LTC) network has surpassed that of Bitcoin Cash (CRYPTO: BCH), and Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE).
